nasb.text: Then the Lord said to Moses, “Go up to this mountain of Abarim, and see the land which I have given to the sons of Israel.

esv.text: The Lord said to Moses, “Go up into this mountain of Abarim and see the land that I have given to the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 耶和華吩咐摩西說：“你要上這亞巴琳山去，看看我賜給以色列人的地。

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西说：“你上亚巴琳山去眺望我赐给以色列人的土地。
